disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe ache and stiffness in the knuckles and middle finger joints of BOTH hands, coming on tonight after an unusually busy day of manual hand work
trigger_question_examples: What are your hands doing tonight?
Which joints hurt, and is it one hand or both?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's both hands, about the same — the big knuckles and the middle joints of my fingers. It came on tonight after a really long day of using my hands.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Morning stiffness in the fingers lasts only about 30 minutes and loosens with movement
trigger_question_examples: How long are your fingers stiff for in the mornings?
Does the stiffness ease as you move around?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My fingers are stiff first thing but it usually loosens off within about half an hour once I get moving.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, chills or feeling systemically unwell
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever or chills?
Do you feel unwell in yourself, apart from the hands?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, no fever or chills. Apart from my hands I feel fine in myself.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The swollen joints are not red and do not feel hot; the swelling is symmetrical across both hands rather than one dramatically inflamed joint
trigger_question_examples: Is any single joint bright red or hot to touch?
Are both hands affected the same, or is one joint much worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're puffy and sore but not red, and they don't feel hot. It's both hands pretty evenly, not just one joint.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long history of milder on-and-off aches and stiffness in the finger joints; no injury or trauma tonight
trigger_question_examples: Have your finger joints given you trouble before?
Did you injure or knock your hands today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My fingers have ached on and off for years, but never this suddenly or this badly. I didn't injure them — it just came on after all the hand work.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe anxiety about permanent crippling/deformity of the hands; lives alone and is worried about coping tonight
trigger_question_examples: What's worrying you most about this?
How are you managing at home tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm terrified my hands are going to be crippled for good, and I live on my own so I don't know how I'll manage tonight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Only occasional over-the-counter paracetamol; no regular prescription medications
trigger_question_examples: Do you take any regular medications?
Have you taken anything for the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Just paracetamol now and then when my hands ache. Nothing regular.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No recent viral illness, sore throat, rash or feeling run down in the weeks before this
trigger_question_examples: Have you been unwell with a cold or virus recently?
Any rashes or feeling run down before this started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't been sick or had a rash or anything like that beforehand.
